geopolitics_summary: Iran war disrupting Hormuz transit; EU weakening methane rules under US pressure; Libya gas explored as Iran-war supply hedge.

themes.headline: Italy pursues Libyan gas to offset Iran war supply disruption
themes.why_it_matters: Iran conflict constrains global LNG/pipeline supply; Libya pipeline to Italy offers marginal relief but ramp-up uncertain. TTF upside risk if Libyan production stalls; downside if it succeeds materially.

themes.headline: EU Commission weakens methane enforcement rules under US pressure
themes.why_it_matters: Relaxed methane regulation reduces operational friction for fossil fuel suppliers, tilting marginal gas sources (including US LNG) more competitive. Long-term structural bearish for carbon price, neutral-to-bullish for gas availability.

themes.headline: US Defense confirms Hormuz strait mission separate from Iran war
themes.why_it_matters: US reassurance on Hormuz security reduces immediate crude/LNG supply shock. Lower crude risk → lower thermal plant marginal cost → bearish for EU power curve, supportive of gas-to-power switching.

themes.headline: EU considers exempting oil firms from methane rules on energy security grounds
themes.why_it_matters: Pre-disruption exemptions favour supply-maximization over climate compliance, easing gas producer constraints. Supports lower EU gas price ceiling; long EUA carry risk if this signals broader climate-rule relaxation.

themes.headline: Lufthansa faces €1.7bn annual cost from jet fuel shortage crisis
themes.why_it_matters: Jet fuel scarcity signals refined product market stress tied to Iran disruptions; indirect upward pressure on overall crude/refining costs. Not direct power/gas, but reflects broader European energy-cost shock from geopolitical supply loss.

watchlist: Hormuz strait reopening timeline and impact on crude/condensate flows to Europe.
EU methane rule enforcement guidance and exemption issuance schedule.
Libya gas field ramp-up rate and pipeline export capacity to Italy.
Trump tariff threats and EU retaliatory stance (energy sector impact TBD).
